cta_pointers.summary: Send self‑determination theory paper to the group
Share the paper and invite feedback
Send a quick follow‑up and propose next steps

resonance_refs.text: It was. It was an adventure, I tell you that much ... resilience, adaptability, and I'm like, I am so prepared ... I will find friends and I will make something happen.
... the message of the movie is opportunity exists at the frontier ... reflected in the reality of startups ...

quote_ref.text: Just we've trained to be cockroaches. We will survive.

framing_summary: Conversation on career development, international experience as resilience training, soft-skills “base athleticism,” effective AI usage, and practical next steps to engage with Careerspan (ICP focus on PMs; buyers Seed–Series A–C).
